JOHN ROSENTHAL, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS LEEANN BORAGNO LEEPER AND CHRISTOPHER BORAGNO. ANNE GRITZER, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS LEEANN LEEPER AND GABRIEL LEEPER. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 2/4/19 IS CONTINUED TO 4/8/19 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. EXPERT DISCOVERY AND ALL TRIAL-RELATED DEADLINES SHALL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. INDEPENDENT MEDICAL EXAMINATION DEADLINE SHALL BE 30 DAYS BEFORE THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
